notes: Sprint 127 - VS Code Extension Auto-Detect Project (SPEC-0015). Extension 100% complete. Implements auto-detection of SDLC project from VS Code workspace folder, eliminating manual UUID configuration. Features: (1) ProjectDetector service scans workspace for .sdlc-config.json, (2) Auto-load project on extension activation, (3) Open Project command to switch projects, (4) ProjectsView UI updated to show auto-detected project. Reduces setup from 6 manual steps to 0. Workflow: User opens folder → Extension auto-detects → Project context loaded. All implementation files exist including tests. UX improvement: No manual UUID entry required.
